2607.10995.title: AsySplat: Efficient Asymmetric 3D Gaussian Splatting for Long-Sequence Scene Modeling
2607.10995.abstract: Recent generalizable 3D Gaussian Splatting models have advanced long-sequence novel view synthesis (NVS), but at the cost of substantial redundant computation. We identify that the redundancy can be mitigated based on two observations: (i) high-precision geometry is not strictly required for high-quality NVS; (ii) appearance learning is generally easier than geometry recovery. Motivated by these insights, we propose an asymmetric architecture that decouples geometry and appearance modeling. The geometry branch processes coarse-grained tokens with most of the parameters for multi-view reconstruction, while the appearance branch operates on fine-grained tokens to capture details using significantly fewer parameters. The two branches interact through bilateral connections, enabling mutual guidance for their respective tasks. This task-aware asymmetry reduces the computational redundancy and allocates the computation more judiciously, thereby increasing parameter efficiency and enabling smaller models to achieve strong performance. On 32-view 960P inputs, our model matches optimization-based methods while delivering nearly 800x speedup, and surpasses the zero-shot performance of state-of-the-art generalizable models with markedly fewer parameters and reduced training/inference overhead, achieving an overall efficiency improvement.
2607.10995.abstract_zh: 近期，可泛化的三维高斯溅射模型在长序列新视角合成方面取得了进展，但代价是大量的冗余计算。我们发现，基于以下两个观察可以减轻这种冗余：(i) 高质量的NVS并不严格要求高精度几何；(ii) 外观学习通常比几何恢复更容易。受这些见解启发，我们提出了一种非对称架构，将几何建模与外观建模解耦。几何分支处理粗粒度令牌，并利用大部分参数进行多视角重建，而外观分支则在细粒度令牌上运行，以显著更少的参数捕捉细节。两个分支通过双向连接进行交互，使其能够为各自的任务相互指导。这种任务感知的非对称设计减少了计算冗余，更合理地分配计算资源，从而提高了参数效率，并使较小模型也能实现强劲性能。在32视图960P输入下，我们的模型在实现近800倍加速的同时，匹配了基于优化的方法；并以明显更少的参数和更低的训练/推理开销，超越了当前最优泛化模型的零样本性能，实现了整体效率的提升。

2607.14935.title: VideoChat3: Fully Open Video MLLM for Efficient and Generalist Video Understanding
2607.14935.abstract: Recent advances in video understanding have spanned motion, long video, and streaming interaction, driving this field toward real-world applications. Despite this progress, current open-source models remain limited in several ways. They often struggle to generalize across diverse video types, making them effective only in specific domains. High computational demands further restrict their efficiency and scalability. Moreover, most models are only partially open, with key components such as training code, strategy, or datasets unavailable, which hinders reproducibility and slows community-driven development. To address these issues, we introduce VideoChat3, a fully open, efficient, and generalist video-centric MLLM. VideoChat3 advances video understanding through two complementary designs. For efficiency, we introduce Inflated 3D Vision Transformer (I3D-ViT) and Adaptive Frame Resolution for Streaming Video Perception, which enables efficient spatiotemporal representation and reduces the cost of processing video inputs during training and inference. For effectiveness, we develop a scalable video data synthesis pipeline that curates three diverse, high-quality training datasets: VideoChat3-Academic2M, VideoChat3-LV116K, and VideoChat3-OL617K, covering general, long-form, and streaming video scenarios, improving the model's generalization across domains. By integrating these designs, VideoChat3 achieves a rare balance of broad generalization and computational efficiency. Experiments across general, long-form, and streaming benchmarks demonstrate that VideoChat3 surpasses prior open-source models with equal or larger parameter counts with only 4B parameters and higher efficiency.
2607.14935.abstract_zh: 视频理解领域在运动分析、长视频处理及流式交互等方面取得的最新进展，正推动该领域迈向现实应用。尽管已有这些进步，当前的开源模型仍存在多方面的局限。它们往往难以泛化至多样化的视频类型，导致仅在特定领域有效。较高的计算需求进一步限制了其效率与可扩展性。此外，大多数模型仅部分开源，其训练代码、策略或关键数据集等核心组件未公开，这不仅阻碍了研究的可复现性，也延缓了社区驱动的开发进程。为应对这些问题，我们推出了VideoChat3——一个完全开源、高效且通用的视频中心化多模态大语言模型（MLLM）。VideoChat3通过两项互补设计推动视频理解能力的发展。在效率方面，我们引入了膨胀式三维视觉变换器（Inflated 3D Vision Transformer, I3D-ViT）及面向流式视频感知的自适应帧分辨率技术，实现了高效的时空表征，并降低了训练与推理过程中视频输入的处理成本。在效能方面，我们构建了一个可扩展的视频数据合成流程，精心策划了三个多样化、高质量的训练数据集：VideoChat3-Academic2M、VideoChat3-LV116K与VideoChat3-OL617K，覆盖通用场景、长视频及流式视频情境，提升了模型在跨领域的泛化能力。通过整合这些设计，VideoChat3在广泛泛化性与计算效率之间实现了难得的平衡。在通用、长视频及流式视频基准测试上的实验表明，仅以40亿参数的规模，VideoChat3在同等或更大参数量级的开源模型中展现出更优性能，同时具有更高的运行效率。

2607.14777.title: SEED: Self-Evolving On-Policy Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
2607.14777.abstract: Large language models are increasingly trained as interactive agents for long-horizon tasks involving multi-turn interaction, tool use, and environment feedback. Outcome-based reinforcement learning (RL) provides a practical optimization paradigm, but its sparse trajectory-level rewards offer limited guidance on intermediate decisions, leaving a supervision gap between episode-level outcomes and token-level policy learning. We propose SEED (SElf-Evolving On-Policy Distillation), a self-evolving framework that converts completed on-policy trajectories into training-time hindsight skills and distills their behavioral effect back into the policy model. SEED first fine-tunes the policy to analyze completed trajectories and generate natural-language skills that capture reusable workflows, decisive observations, or failure-avoidance rules. During RL, the current policy both collects trajectories and serves as the analyzer that extracts hindsight skills from them. Policy updates therefore improve subsequent decision making and skill analysis together, allowing hindsight supervision to evolve with the policy. SEED then re-scores the sampled actions under ordinary and skill-augmented contexts, converting the skill-induced probability shift into a dense token-level on-policy distillation signal. This signal is jointly optimized with outcome-based RL, keeping the auxiliary supervision aligned with the current trajectory distribution. Extensive experiments on text-based and vision-based agentic tasks show that SEED consistently improves performance and sample efficiency, exhibiting robust generalization to unseen scenarios. Our code is available atthis https URL.
2607.14777.abstract_zh: 大型语言模型日益被训练为面向长程任务的交互式智能体，这些任务涉及多轮交互、工具使用和环境反馈。基于结果（Outcome-based）的强化学习提供了一种实用的优化范式，但其稀疏的轨迹级奖励对中间决策的指导有限，在回合级结果与词元级策略学习之间形成了监督空白。我们提出SEED（自演化的同策略蒸馏）框架，该框架将已完成的同策略轨迹转化为训练时的事后技能，并将其行为效应蒸馏回策略模型。SEED首先对策略进行微调，使其能够分析已完成的轨迹并生成自然语言技能，这些技能捕获了可复用的工作流程、关键观察结果或故障规避规则。在强化学习过程中，当前策略既收集轨迹，又作为分析器从这些轨迹中提取事后技能。因此，策略更新同时提升了后续决策能力和技能分析能力，使得事后监督能够随策略共同演化。随后，SEED在普通上下文和技能增强上下文中对采样动作进行重新评分，将技能诱导的概率变化转化为密集的词元级同策略蒸馏信号。该信号与基于结果的强化学习联合优化，确保辅助监督与当前轨迹分布保持一致。在基于文本和基于视觉的智能体任务上的大量实验表明，SEED持续提升了性能与样本效率，并对未见场景展现出鲁棒的泛化能力。我们的代码可通过此链接获取：https URL。

2607.15257.title: SearchOS-V1: Towards Robust Open-Domain Information-Seeking Agent Collaboration
2607.15257.abstract: Recent advances in Tool-Integrated Large Language Models have made web search a core capability of information-seeking agents. However, as interaction histories grow, agents increasingly struggle to track task progress. When search attempts fail to yield useful evidence, current single- and multi-agent systems can become trapped in repetitive loops, wasting search budgets and ultimately compromising the quality and completeness of the final output. We introduce SearchOS, a system-level multi-agent framework that turns fragile, implicit search progress into explicit, persistent, and shared state. First, we formulate open-domain information seeking as relational schema completion with grounded citations, where agents discover entities, populate attributes across linked tables, and anchor each value to source evidence. Then we design Search-Oriented Context Management (SOCM), which externalizes the evolving state into Frontier Task, an Evidence Graph, a Coverage Map, and Failure Memory. Built on SOCM, SearchOS applies a pipeline-parallel scheduling mechanism that overlaps the execution of sub-agents and continuously refills freed slots with tasks targeting unresolved coverage gaps to improve utilization and throughput. To schedule and control the execution of search agents, SearchOS introduces a Search Tool Middleware Harness that intercepts model and tool interactions to record grounded evidence and react to stalls or budget exhaustion, and provides a reusable hierarchical skill system comprising strategy and access skills to augment the agents' search process and avoid repeating failed search patterns across runs. On WideSearch and GISA, SearchOS leads all metrics among the evaluated single- and multi-agent baselines, paving the way toward robust information-seeking collaboration.
2607.15257.abstract_zh: 工具集成大型语言模型的最新进展使得网络搜索成为信息检索智能体的核心能力。然而随着交互历史的增长，智能体在跟踪任务进度方面面临日益严峻的挑战。当搜索尝试未能获取有效证据时，现有的单智能体与多智能体系统容易陷入重复循环，既浪费搜索资源，又最终损害输出结果的质量与完整性。我们提出SearchOS——一个系统级多智能体框架，将脆弱、隐式的搜索进程转化为显式、持久且共享的状态。首先，我们将开放域信息检索形式化为基于可靠引证的关系模式补全任务，使智能体能够发现实体、在关联表中填充属性，并将每个数值锚定至源证据。随后我们设计了面向搜索的上下文管理机制，将动态演化的状态外化为四大组件：前沿任务队列、证据图谱、覆盖度地图与失败记忆库。基于此架构，SearchOS采用流水线并行调度机制，通过重叠执行子智能体任务，并持续向空闲槽位填充针对未覆盖缺口的新任务，从而提升资源利用率和系统吞吐量。为调度控制搜索智能体的执行，SearchOS引入了搜索工具中间件适配层，该层可拦截模型与工具的交互以记录可靠证据，并对停滞状态或预算耗尽做出响应；同时提供包含策略技能与访问技能的可复用层级技能系统，以增强智能体的搜索过程，避免在多轮运行中重复失败的搜索模式。在WideSearch和GISA基准测试中，SearchOS在所有评估的单智能体与多智能体基线中全面领先，为鲁棒的信息检索协作开辟了新路径。

2607.15207.title: BadWAM: When World-Action Models Dream Right but Act Wrong
2607.15207.abstract: World-action models (WAMs) are emerging as a promising foundation for embodied control: rather than predicting actions alone, they learn representations that couple action generation with future world prediction. This coupling is often viewed as a source of robustness, interpretability, and safety, as a robot's action can in principle be checked against its imagined future. In this paper, we show that this assumption is fragile. We introduce BadWAM, a unified framework for modeling and evaluating World-Action Drift Attacks: a new class of WAM-specific adversarial attacks that use small visual perturbations to break the alignment between what a WAM imagines and what it executes. BadWAM characterizes this attack surface along two natural criteria: attack strength and stealthiness. When the adversary prioritizes disruption, BadWAM instantiates an action-only adversarial attack, which directly drives the model toward task-failing actions. When the adversary additionally prioritizes stealth, BadWAM instantiates an imagination-preserving adversarial attack, which seeks to induce harmful action shifts while keeping the model's predicted future close to its clean imagination. Together, these two attacks capture a spectrum of WAM-specific failures: from overt action hijacking to stealthier cases where the model appears to imagine a plausible future but executes a desynchronized action. We evaluate BadWAM across different variants of WAMs. Results show that our attacks substantially reduce task success rates under closed-loop execution. For example, our action-only attack reduces the model performance from 96.5% to 43.1% success. The results of our imagination-preserving attack further exposes a WAM-specific vulnerability: moderate future-preserving regularization can maintain strong attack performance while reducing future imagination drift.
2607.15207.abstract_zh: 世界行动模型（World-action models, WAMs）正逐渐成为具身控制领域一个有前景的基础框架：它们不仅预测动作，还学习将动作生成与未来世界预测相耦合的表征。这种耦合通常被视为鲁棒性、可解释性和安全性的来源，因为从原理上，机器人的动作可以通过其想象的未来进行验证。本文揭示这一假设存在脆弱性。我们提出BadWAM——一个用于建模和评估世界行动漂移攻击的统一框架，这是一类针对WAM的新型对抗攻击，通过微小的视觉扰动破坏WAM的想象内容与实际执行动作之间的一致性。BadWAM从两个自然维度刻画此类攻击面：攻击强度与隐蔽性。当攻击者以破坏性为主导时，BadWAM实例化为纯动作对抗攻击，直接驱使模型产生导致任务失败的动作；当攻击者同时注重隐蔽性时，BadWAM则实例化为想象保持对抗攻击，在诱导有害动作偏移的同时，使模型预测的未来状态尽可能接近原始清洁想象。这两种攻击共同揭示了WAM特有的故障谱系：从明显的动作劫持，到更为隐蔽的情况——模型看似想象出合理的未来，却执行了与之脱节的动作。我们在多种WAM变体上评估BadWAM，结果表明在闭环执行中，所提攻击能显著降低任务成功率。例如，纯动作攻击使模型性能从96.5%的成功率降至43.1%；想象保持攻击的结果进一步暴露出WAM特有的脆弱性：适度的未来保持正则化可在维持较强攻击性能的同时，减少未来想象的漂移。

2607.14202.title: KeyFrame-Compass: Towards Comprehensive Evaluation of Keyframe-Conditioned Video Generation
2607.14202.abstract: Video generation increasingly relies on keyframe-based workflows, where creators specify a sequence of reference images to guide generation. Although recent models support multi-keyframe conditioning, it remains unclear whether they can faithfully reproduce the prescribed keyframes while maintaining overall video quality. We present KeyFrame-Compass, the first comprehensive benchmark for evaluating keyframe-conditioned video generation. The benchmark contains 386 carefully curated samples spanning three application domains, two video structures, two prompt granularities, two conditioning formats, and four keyframe densities, enabling controlled analysis under diverse generation settings. We further introduce an automated evaluation framework that jointly measures keyframe execution and overall video quality. Specifically, we decompose keyframe execution into six complementary metrics covering presence, fidelity, temporal ordering, localization, persistence, and uniqueness, while assessing overall video quality through evidence-grounded MLLM judgments augmented with specialized perception models. Experiments on nine representative video generation systems reveal several fundamental limitations. Current models exhibit a clear trade-off between faithful keyframe execution and natural video synthesis. Their performance further degrades as keyframe constraints become denser and most open-source models also fail to interpret storyboard-grid inputs as temporally ordered keyframe sequences.
2607.14202.abstract_zh: 视频生成日益依赖基于关键帧的工作流程，创作者通过指定参考图像序列来引导生成过程。尽管现有模型已支持多关键帧条件控制，但其能否在保持整体视频质量的同时准确复现预设关键帧仍不明确。本文提出KeyFrame-Compass——首个用于评估关键帧条件视频生成的综合基准。该基准包含386个精心设计的样本，涵盖三个应用领域、两种视频结构、两种提示词粒度、两种条件格式及四种关键帧密度，支持在多维生成场景下进行受控分析。我们进一步构建了自动化评估框架，可同步衡量关键帧执行度与整体视频质量。具体而言，我们将关键帧执行度解构为六个互补指标，涵盖存在性、保真度、时序顺序、空间定位、持续性与独特性；同时通过基于证据的多模态大语言模型(MLLM)评估结合专用感知模型增强，系统评判整体视频质量。对九个代表性视频生成系统的实验揭示了若干根本性局限：当前模型在忠实执行关键帧与自然视频合成之间存在明显权衡；随着关键帧约束密度增加，其性能进一步下降；多数开源模型亦无法将故事板网格(storyboard-grid)输入正确解析为时序性关键帧序列。

2607.14189.title: MultiRef-Compass: Towards Comprehensive Evaluation of Multi-Reference-to-Audio-Video Generation
2607.14189.abstract: Multi-reference-to-audio-video (MR2AV) generation aims to generate coherent audio-video content conditioned on multiple references and textual instructions. Existing benchmarks mainly focus on text-driven generation, single-reference subject preservation, or isolated audio-video alignment, leaving the emerging MR2AV setting largely unexplored. Compared with these settings, MR2AV requires models to jointly reason over multiple references while generating synchronized visual and audio content. Models must not only preserve each reference faithfully but also correctly bind and compose multiple referenced entities into coherent audio-visual events. To address this gap, we introduce MultiRef-Compass, a unified benchmark for MR2AV generation. It comprises $350$ carefully curated samples constructed through a scalable and controllable asset-composition pipeline, covering multi-view subject preservation, multi-entity binding, and human-object-scene composition. To provide interpretable assessment, MultiRef-Compass defines an evaluation protocol with four dimensions: Basic Quality, Reference Consistency, Audio-Visual Consistency, and Instruction Following, using 14 sub-metrics. MultiRef-Compass integrates automatic metrics with a rejudging-enhanced MLLM-as-a-Judge framework, enabling scalable and auditable evaluation of both perceptual fidelity and reference-conditioned composition. Extensive experiments on eight representative MR2AV systems reveal substantial room for improvement across multiple evaluation dimensions, underscoring the need for a comprehensive benchmark and positioning MultiRef-Compass as a foundation for future MR2AV research.
2607.14189.abstract_zh: 多参考音视频生成（Multi-reference-to-audio-video, MR2AV）旨在基于多个参考对象和文本指令生成连贯的音视频内容。现有基准主要关注文本驱动生成、单参考主体保持或孤立的音视频对齐，而对新兴的MR2AV设定尚未充分探索。相较于这些设定，MR2AV要求模型在生成同步的视觉与音频内容时，能同时对多个参考对象进行联合推理。模型不仅需要忠实保持每个参考对象的特征，还需正确绑定并组合多个参考实体，以形成连贯的视听事件。为填补这一空白，我们提出了MultiRef-Compass——一个面向MR2AV生成的统一基准。该基准包含350个精心构建的样本，这些样本通过可扩展且可控的资产组合流程创建，涵盖多视角主体保持、多实体绑定以及人-物-场景组合三大任务。为提供可解释的评估机制，MultiRef-Compass定义了包含四个维度（基础质量、参考一致性、视听一致性及指令遵循）的评价体系，共采用14项子指标。该基准将自动指标与经重评判增强的多模态大语言模型即评判员框架相结合，实现了对感知保真度与参考条件组合能力的可扩展、可审计评估。通过对八个代表性MR2AV系统的大量实验，我们发现各评估维度均存在显著改进空间，这凸显了构建综合性基准的必要性，也确立了MultiRef-Compass作为未来MR2AV研究基础的重要地位。

2607.14952.title: LongStraw: Long-Context RL Beyond 2M Tokens under a Fixed GPU Budget
2607.14952.abstract: A growing gap separates inference context lengths from RL post-training: inference systems are approaching million-token contexts, while post-training workloads often remain at 256K tokens or below and rely on length generalization at deployment. The gap is especially important for AI agents, whose observations, tool outputs, documents, and prior decisions accumulate over long trajectories. LongStraw is an architecture-aware execution stack for million-token RL post-training under a fixed GPU budget, instantiated with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). It evaluates the shared prompt without autograd, retains only model-specific state needed by later tokens, and replays short response branches one at a time, reducing the live training graph at the cost of additional replay time. We implement it for the hybrid recurrent and full-attention Qwen3.6-27B and the compressed-attention mixture-of-experts GLM-5.2. On eight H20 GPUs, LongStraw completes grouped Qwen scoring and response backward at 2.1M positions for groups of 2 and 8; increasing the group size adds only 0.21 GB of peak allocated memory, while a separate stress test reaches 4.46M positions. On 32 H20 GPUs, we validate the end-to-end LongStraw execution path for a 2.1M-token prompt across all 78 layers of GLM-5.2. These experiments establish execution capacity rather than complete training correctness because the captured prompt state is detached and some distributed forward and gradient composition paths remain incomplete.
2607.14952.abstract_zh: 推理上下文长度与强化学习后训练之间的差距日益扩大：推理系统已接近百万令牌的上下文，而后训练工作负载通常保持在256K令牌或更短，并依赖部署时的长度泛化能力。这一差距对于AI智能体尤为重要，其观测数据、工具输出、文档及先前决策会在长轨迹中持续累积。LongStraw是一种面向架构的、在固定GPU预算下实现百万令牌级强化学习后训练的执行框架，其具体实现基于分组相对策略优化（GRPO）。该系统无需自动求导即可评估共享提示，仅保留后续令牌所需的模型特定状态，并逐次重播短响应分支，以增加重播时间为代价缩减实时训练图规模。我们针对混合循环与全注意力机制的Qwen3.6-27B模型，以及采用压缩注意力与专家混合架构的GLM-5.2模型实现了该框架。在八张H20 GPU上，LongStraw以分组规模2和8完成了210万位置的分组Qwen评分与响应反向计算；将分组规模扩大仅增加0.21 GB的峰值分配内存，而独立压力测试则达到446万位置。在32张H20 GPU上，我们验证了LongStraw对210万令牌提示在GLM-5.2全部78层中的端到端执行路径。这些实验主要验证执行容量而非完整的训练正确性，因为捕获的提示状态已分离且部分分布式前向与梯度组合路径尚未完备。

2607.12800.title: UniVR: Thinking in Visual Space for Unified Visual Reasoning
2607.12800.abstract: Learning broad world knowledge directly from raw visual data is a fundamental capability of intelligence. We introduce UniVR, the first investigation into simultaneously learning complex reasoning, fine-grained physical dynamics, and long-term planning from pure visual demonstrations. At its core, UniVR features VR-GRPO, a reinforcement learning paradigm with complementary global and step-level rewards. This approach enforces logical coherence and physical consistency throughout the reasoning process without requiring task-specific heuristics or image-text pairs. To train and evaluate UniVR, we construct VR-X, a large-scale benchmark curated from 16 diverse sources spanning long-horizon manipulation, spatial puzzles, and physical reasoning. It is the first comprehensive suite to assess these heterogeneous capabilities under a purely visual protocol. Remarkably, UniVR achieves up to a 25% improvement on VR-X, and its superior visual reasoning also boosts performance on various multimodal understanding benchmarks. These findings underscore the vast potential of reasoning within visual spaces, with all code, data, and models are open-sourced for further research.
2607.12800.abstract_zh: 直接从原始视觉数据中学习广泛的世界知识是智能的一项基本能力。我们提出了UniVR，这是首个从纯视觉演示中同时学习复杂推理、细粒度物理动态和长期规划的探索性研究。其核心是VR-GRPO——一种融合互补性全局奖励与步骤级奖励的强化学习范式。该方法在无需任务特定启发式规则或图文配对的情况下，确保了整个推理过程的逻辑连贯性与物理一致性。为训练和评估UniVR，我们构建了VR-X基准数据集，该数据集从16个不同来源中精选整理而成，涵盖长时程操作、空间解谜及物理推理等领域。这是首个在纯视觉协议下评估这些异构能力的综合性测试平台。值得注意的是，UniVR在VR-X上实现了高达25%的性能提升，其卓越的视觉推理能力还显著增强了在多模态理解基准测试中的表现。这些发现彰显了视觉空间内进行推理的巨大潜力，所有代码、数据及模型均已开源以供进一步研究。

2607.14076.title: From Pixels to States: Rethinking Interactive World Models as Game Engines
2607.14076.abstract: Building interactive worlds that respond coherently to player actions has long been a shared goal of computer graphics, games, and artificial intelligence. Recent video generative models provide a data-driven route toward this goal by predicting future observations conditioned on user actions, and are increasingly regarded as potential next-generation game engines. Realizing a genuinely interactive game world, however, requires interaction outcomes that follow rules over evolving game conditions, consequences that persist over long horizons, and a generation loop that operates in real time. Conventional game engines realize these properties through a recurrent action-state-observation loop, in which player actions update an explicit game state according to predefined rules and observations are rendered from the resulting state. Taking this loop as an organizing lens, this paper examines interactive game world modeling along four dimensions: player action control, game state dynamics, state-observation persistence, and real-time interactive generation. For each dimension, we start from the capabilities required by an interactive game world, group existing approaches into representative families, and discuss the strengths and trade-offs of each family. Complementing this analysis, we present a scalable data engine for Black Myth: Wukong that collects over 90 hours of gameplay with frame-aligned player actions, ground-truth game states, and visual observations, together with structured and semantic annotations, as a resource for state-aware game world modeling. We hope this paper offers a clear picture of where the field stands and fosters progress toward interactive game worlds.
2607.14076.abstract_zh: 长期以来，构建能够对玩家行为作出连贯响应的交互式世界一直是计算机图形学、游戏和人工智能领域的共同目标。近期视频生成模型通过预测基于用户动作的未来观测数据，为这一目标提供了数据驱动的实现路径，并日益被视为潜在的下一代游戏引擎。然而，要实现真正交互式的游戏世界，需要满足以下条件：交互结果遵循动态游戏规则约束、影响具有长时程持续性，且生成循环能够实时运行。传统游戏引擎通过循环执行的“动作-状态-观测”循环实现这些特性：玩家动作根据预定义规则更新显式游戏状态，观测画面则从更新后的状态渲染生成。以该循环作为分析框架，本文从四个维度审视交互式游戏世界建模：玩家动作控制、游戏状态动态演化、状态-观测持续性以及实时交互生成。针对每个维度，我们首先剖析交互式游戏世界所需的核心能力，将现有方法归纳为代表性技术分支，并探讨各分支的优势与内在权衡。基于此分析，我们进一步为《黑神话：悟空》构建了可扩展的数据引擎，采集超过90小时的游戏录像，包含帧对齐的玩家动作、真实游戏状态与视觉观测数据，以及结构化与语义标注，为具备状态感知能力的游戏世界建模提供资源支撑。我们希望本文能为该领域发展现状提供清晰图景，并推动交互式游戏世界研究向前迈进。

2607.13188.title: Concurrent Image Understanding and Generation: Self-Correcting Coupled Markov Jump Processes
2607.13188.abstract: Human cognition does not separate understanding and generation. A teacher at a whiteboard speaks and draws $\textit{together}$, each modality reshapes the other. In this paper, we bring this coupled loop to artificial systems. Masked Diffusion Models (MDMs) are ideally suited to this task, yet existing samplers either decode text and image interleavedly or independently update them in parallel branches that share only previous-step history, but not the other modality's latest decisions $\textit{within}$ the same step; combined with MDMs' inability to remask, cross-modal contradictions are neither detected nor repaired. We introduce $\textbf{Self-Correcting Coupled Markov Jump Processes (SC-CMJP)}$, a framework in which one modality's transition rates are functionals of the other modality's confidence score, as weighted by cross-modal attention. Furthermore, a remasking jump retracts commitments the moment cross-modal evidence turns against them. In conjunction with SC-CMJP, we introduce $\texttt{CO}_\texttt{2}\texttt{Jump}$ (Self-$\underline{\text{CO}}$rrecting $\underline{\text{CO}}$upled $\underline{\text{Jump}}$), a novel training-free single-pass sampler for joint multimodal geneneration. For training and evaluation purposes, we have created and will release three large-scale joint multimodal generation corpora: $\text{JEdit-1M}$, $\text{JMaze-200K}$, $\text{JNono-200K}$, with matching in- and out-of-distribution benchmarks. $\texttt{CO}_\texttt{2}\texttt{Jump}$ achieves best joint performance for image understanding and editing as well as visual reasoning (maze and nonogram solving). The performance of the sampler scales monotonically with the number of denoising steps, evidence that the benefits of cross-modal coupling $\textit{compound}$ across the trajectory. Project page:this https URL
2607.13188.abstract_zh: 人类认知并不将理解与生成割裂开来。教师在白板前同时进行讲解与绘图，每种模态都会重塑另一种模态。在本研究中，我们将这种耦合循环引入人工智能系统。掩码扩散模型（Masked Diffusion Models，MDMs）天生适合此类任务，但现有采样器要么以交错方式解码文本与图像，要么在仅共享前序步骤历史而非同步骤内另一模态最新决策的并行分支中独立更新它们；加之MDM缺乏重掩码能力，跨模态矛盾既无法被检测也无法被修复。我们提出**自校正耦合马尔可夫跳跃过程（Self-Correcting Coupled Markov Jump Processes，SC-CMJP）**，该框架使一种模态的转移速率成为另一模态置信度分数的泛函，并通过跨模态注意力进行加权。此外，重掩码跳跃机制能在跨模态证据出现矛盾时即时撤回已作出的承诺。配合SC-CMJP框架，我们提出$\texttt{CO}_\texttt{2}\texttt{Jump}$（自校正耦合跳跃采样器），这是一种无需训练的单通道采样器，专为联合多模态生成任务设计。为满足训练与评估需求，我们创建并将公开发布三个大规模联合多模态生成数据集：$\text{JEdit-1M}$、$\text{JMaze-200K}$、$\text{JNono-200K}$，配套提供分布内与分布外基准测试。$\texttt{CO}_\texttt{2}\texttt{Jump}$在图像理解与编辑以及视觉推理（迷宫和数织谜题求解）任务中均取得最佳联合性能。该采样器的性能随去噪步骤数增加呈现单调提升，证明跨模态耦合的效益在生成轨迹中持续**复合增长**。项目页面：this https URL

2607.03065.title: Spectral Rewiring for Exploration, Purification, and Model Merging
2607.03065.abstract: Reinforcement learning has become a standard post-training recipe for large language models, but dense full-parameter updates create two deployment-relevant bottlenecks: suppressed reasoning performance, often reflected by premature saturation of test-time scaling, and interference when consolidating multiple capabilities through multi-domain training or model merging. We show that the reasoning-effective component of these updates is largely concentrated in the base model's spectral space, motivating Subspace-Aligned Rewiring (SAR), a post-hoc editing method that retains this spectral core while removing orthogonal components. SAR therefore preserves reasoning gains and filters residual update directions that suppress performance or amplify cross-domain interference. Across several model families and scales, SAR extracts compact reasoning cores using as little as approximately 0.58% of total parameters: it preserves over 99% of post-training performance and improves high-k exploration in mathematical reasoning, and generalizes to agentic coding by improving six of seven open benchmarks on an in-house model. SAR also purifies mixed-domain training updates by releasing suppressed coding capability while maintaining math reasoning and instruction following. It further enables model merging across experts, yielding cross-domain generalization that surpasses previous merging baselines and even the best single-domain experts. Overall, SAR shows that extracting reasoning-effective updates from parameter geometry can serve as a training-free mechanism to improve reasoning and multi-domain performance.
2607.03065.abstract_zh: 强化学习已成为大型语言模型（Large Language Models）标准化的后训练方案，但密集的全参数更新会带来两个与部署相关的瓶颈：推理性能受抑制（通常表现为测试时扩展的过早饱和），以及通过多领域训练或模型合并进行多能力整合时产生的干扰。我们发现，这些更新中真正有效提升推理能力的成分主要集中在基础模型的光谱空间（spectral space）中，这启发了子空间对齐重布线（Subspace-Aligned Rewiring，SAR）方法——一种后验编辑方法，能够保留这一光谱核心并去除正交成分。因此，SAR 在维持推理增益的同时，过滤了那些抑制性能或加剧跨领域干扰的残余更新方向。在多个模型系列与规模上的实验表明，SAR 仅使用约 0.58% 的总参数即可提取出紧凑的推理核心：它能保留超过 99% 的后训练性能，并提升数学推理中的高阶探索能力；在内部模型的测试中，SAR 还泛化至智能编码任务，在七项公开基准中有六项取得提升。此外，SAR 能纯化混合领域训练更新，在保持数学推理与指令跟随能力的同时，释放受抑制的编码能力。该方法还能实现跨专家模型的合并，产生的跨领域泛化效果超越了以往的合并基线，甚至优于最佳的单领域专家模型。总体而言，SAR 表明，从参数几何中提取对推理有效的更新，可作为一种无需额外训练的机制，显著提升推理能力与多领域性能。

2607.13399.title: Demystifying On-Policy Distillation: Roles, Pathologies, and Regulations
2607.13399.abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) has become a key paradigm in LLM post-training, yet its training dynamics remain poorly understood. We present a systematic study examining the role, pathologies, and regulations of OPD. We first clarify the role of OPD as an exploration catalyst: it steers the student toward correct reasoning paths via dense token-level guidance, without expanding capability ceiling. We confirm this by showing that prompt diversity matters more than per-problem sampling numbers, and critically, that the effectiveness of OPD hinges entirely on the quality of its guiding signal. This dependency exposes two pathologies that derail exploration. The Student-Teacher Mismatch occurs when a large teacher-student distributional gap causes the guiding signal to misalign with task correctness, steering exploration in counterproductive directions. Length Exploitation arises when the aggregated token-level objective creates length-dependent shortcuts, allowing the student to game the reward landscape through response truncation or redundant padding, exploring degenerate length modes rather than reasoning strategies. To tame these pathologies, we investigate lightweight signal regulations: advantage clipping and log-scale compression, ensuring exploration is guided by faithful signals. Experiments across seven benchmarks demonstrate that these regulations alleviate length exploitation and enable effective distillation, stably surpassing OPD variants and RLVR baselines, thereby confirming that well-regulated signal quality, rather than mere teacher scale, governs successful exploration in OPD.
2607.13399.abstract_zh: 同策略蒸馏(On-policy distillation，OPD)已成为大语言模型后训练的关键范式，但其训练动态机制仍未得到充分理解。本文通过系统性研究探讨了OPD的作用机制、病理现象及调控方法。我们首先明确了OPD作为探索催化剂的作用：它通过密集的令牌级(token-level)指导将学生模型引向正确的推理路径，但不会扩展能力上限。我们通过实验证实：提示多样性比单问题采样数量更为重要，且关键在于OPD的有效性完全取决于其引导信号的质量。这种依赖性暴露了两种阻碍探索的病理现象。当较大的师生分布差距导致引导信号与任务正确性错位时，会出现师生失配(Student-Teacher Mismatch)现象，使探索偏离有效方向；而当聚合的令牌级目标形成长度依赖的捷径时，则会产生长度利用(Length Exploitation)现象，使学生模型能够通过截断回答或冗余填充来操纵奖励机制，探索退化的长度模式而非推理策略。为抑制这些病理现象，我们研究了轻量级信号调控方法：优势值裁剪(advantage clipping)和对数尺度压缩(log-scale compression)，确保探索过程由可信信号引导。在七个基准测试上的实验表明，这些调控方法能有效缓解长度利用问题，实现高效蒸馏，稳定超越OPD变体及RLVR基线，从而证实了良好调控的信号质量（而非单纯扩大教师模型规模）才是决定OPD探索成功的关键因素。

2607.15038.title: Video = World + Event Stream
2607.15038.abstract: We present Wan-Streamer v0.3, which reframes our native-streaming interaction model under a single organizing view: a video is a world plus an event stream. The world is the persistent context in which a video unfolds, including the environment, scene, subjects, ambient acoustic conditions, voice characteristics, and other relatively stable conditions. The event stream is everything that changes over time within that world, including scene or environmental changes, subject behavior, speech, and other sounds. This yields a general-purpose pretraining task over large amounts of real video: given a world and incoming input, predict how the world moves, changes, and responds in real time. The resulting competence can be specialized to a broad family of real-time downstream tasks. We instantiate it on real-time full-duplex audio-visual interaction, where the event stream is the agent's speech together with free-form behavior. Functionally, the model's multimodal understanding process is vision-language-action-like: it maps multimodal user input to language-form speech and behavior actions. Wan-Streamer v0.3 preserves the v0.2 operating point: 640x368 video at 25 FPS, a 160 ms streaming unit, approximately 200 ms model-side response latency, and approximately 550 ms total interaction latency under a 350 ms bidirectional network budget.
2607.15038.abstract_zh: 我们推出Wan-Streamer v0.3版本，该版本以统一框架重构了原生流式交互模型的核心观点：视频即世界加事件流。世界是视频展开的持久化语境，包含环境、场景、主体、环境声学条件、语音特征及其他相对稳定的要素。事件流则是在该世界中随时间变化的所有内容，涵盖场景或环境变化、主体行为、语音及其他声音。基于此，我们构建了面向海量真实视频的通用预训练任务：在给定世界状态与实时输入的条件下，预测世界如何实时运动、变化与响应。由此获得的能力可适配于广泛的实时下游任务体系。我们在实时全双工视听交互场景中实现了该框架的实例化，其中事件流由智能体的语音与自由行为共同构成。在功能层面，模型的多模态理解过程呈现类视觉-语言-动作特性：它将多模态用户输入映射为语言形式的语音与行为动作。Wan-Streamer v0.3保持了v0.2版本的操作参数：640x368分辨率25帧/秒视频流，160毫秒流式处理单元，约200毫秒模型端响应延迟，在350毫秒双向网络预算下实现约550毫秒的总交互延迟。

2607.15275.title: RoboTTT: Context Scaling for Robot Policies
2607.15275.abstract: Recent robot foundation models operate with single-step or short-history visuomotor context. We introduce Test-Time-Training Robot Policies (RoboTTT), a robot model and training recipe that scale visuomotor context to 8K timesteps, three orders of magnitude beyond state-of-the-art policies, without growing inference latency. At this context length, we unlock new robot capabilities: one-shot in-context imitation from human video demonstrations, on-the-fly policy improvement, robustness to perturbations, and stronger performance on multi-stage, long-horizon tasks. We also observe, for the first time, steady gains in closed-loop performance as pretraining context length scales. At its core, RoboTTT integrates Test-Time Training into robot foundation models such as Vision-Language-Action policies, yielding a sequence model whose recurrent state consists of fast weights, parameters updated by gradient descent during both training and inference, compressing histories into weight space and retrieving contextual information for long-context conditioning. To scale training context length, the recipe combines sequence action forcing with truncated backpropagation through time. On challenging real-robot manipulation tasks, RoboTTT improves overall performance by 87% over the single-step context baseline and fully completes a five-minute, ten-stage assembly task, which no baseline ever does. RoboTTT trained with 8K-timestep context outperforms the same model pretrained with 1K timesteps by 62%, suggesting context length as a new scaling axis for robot foundation models. Videos are available atthis https URL
2607.15275.abstract_zh: 现有机器人基础模型通常基于单步或短时序的视觉运动上下文进行决策。本研究提出测试时训练机器人策略模型，该模型及其训练方案将视觉运动上下文扩展至8000个时间步长，较当前最优策略提升三个数量级，且未增加推理延迟。在此上下文长度下，我们解锁了机器人新能力：基于人类视频演示的单次上下文模仿学习、实时策略优化、抗干扰鲁棒性，以及在多阶段长周期任务中更强的性能表现。我们首次观察到，随着预训练上下文长度的扩展，闭环性能呈现稳定增益。该模型的核心在于将测试时训练机制融入视觉-语言-动作策略等机器人基础模型，构建出具有快速权重递归状态的序列模型——这些参数在训练和推理期间均通过梯度下降实时更新，将历史轨迹压缩至权重空间，并为长上下文条件检索情境信息。为实现训练上下文长度的扩展，该方案融合了序列动作强制学习与截断时间反向传播技术。在真实机器人操控任务中，该模型整体性能较单步上下文基线提升87%，并能完整完成长达五分钟、包含十个阶段的装配任务（所有基线模型均未能实现）。使用8000时间步长上下文训练的模型，其性能较相同架构的1000时间步长预训练模型提升62%，这表明上下文长度可作为机器人基础模型的新扩展维度。演示视频可通过此链接查看：https URL

2607.14749.title: WanSong v1.0 Technical Report
2607.14749.abstract: Music generation foundation models have recently attracted significant industry attention. However, achieving efficient generation and high-fidelity long-form audio while supporting controllability remains challenging. To address these needs, we present \textbf{WanSong}, a simple yet powerful approach for long-form, commercial-grade song generation. Unlike autoregressive (AR) and cascaded multi-stage pipelines (\eg, AR followed by diffusion), \textbf{WanSong} is a pure diffusion-based model that directly generates high-fidelity, multilingual songs up to 5 minutes and outputs dual stems (vocals and background music) in a single run. In addition, our diffusion framework enables faster inference through step-distillation, and offers an efficient pathway for fine-tuning and customization to support downstream editing tasks.
2607.14749.abstract_zh: 音乐生成基础模型（foundation models）近期引发了业界的广泛关注。然而，在支持可控性的同时实现高效生成与高保真长音频，仍面临挑战。为应对这些需求，我们提出了\textbf{WanSong}——一种简单而强大的长篇幅商业级歌曲生成方法。与自回归（autoregressive, AR）及级联多阶段流程（例如先AR后扩散模型）不同，\textbf{WanSong}是一个纯基于扩散（diffusion）的模型，能够单次运行直接生成长达5分钟的高保真多语言歌曲，并输出双音轨（人声与背景音乐）。此外，我们的扩散框架通过步数蒸馏（step-distillation）实现了更快的推理速度，并为微调与定制提供了高效途径，以支持下游编辑任务。

2607.15273.title: MeanFlowNFT: Bringing Forward-Process RL to Average-Velocity Generators
2607.15273.abstract: MeanFlow generators achieve fast few-step sampling by predicting average velocities over time intervals, making them attractive for efficient generation. Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a powerful way to align diffusion and flow models with human preferences and task-specific objectives. In particular, DiffusionNFT offers an efficient forward-process RL framework that does not require reverse-process trajectories or likelihood estimation. However, applying such RL methods to MeanFlow remains underexplored. DiffusionNFT optimizes instantaneous velocities, whereas MeanFlow samples with average velocities. To bridge this gap, we introduce MeanFlowNFT. Inspired by the MeanFlow identity, which bridges average and instantaneous velocities, we construct an induced instantaneous-velocity predictor. We apply the DiffusionNFT objective to this predictor, making reward optimization well-defined for MeanFlow. Sampling remains based on the average velocity, preserving MeanFlow's fast few-step generation. We further prove that MeanFlowNFT inherits DiffusionNFT's strict policy-improvement guarantee. Experiments on image and video generation show that MeanFlowNFT consistently improves baselines. Moreover, it outperforms prior state-of-the-art RL-tuned few-step generators on most metrics ($6$ of $8$ on SD3.5-M), and can even surpass multi-step RL-tuned diffusion while using only a few sampling steps. For instance, on Wan 2.1, $4$-step MeanFlowNFT reaches a VBench score of $84.33$, surpassing $50$-step LongCat-Video RL ($82.57$).
2607.15273.abstract_zh: 均值流（MeanFlow）生成器通过预测时间间隔内的平均速度实现快速少步采样，使其在高效生成方面具有吸引力。强化学习（RL）已成为使扩散模型和流模型与人类偏好及任务特定目标对齐的强大方法。特别是，DiffusionNFT 提供了一个高效的前向过程强化学习框架，无需反向过程轨迹或似然估计。然而，将此类强化学习方法应用于均值流的研究仍显不足。DiffusionNFT 优化瞬时速度，而均值流则基于平均速度进行采样。为弥合这一差距，我们提出了 MeanFlowNFT。受连接平均速度与瞬时速度的均值流恒等式（MeanFlow identity）启发，我们构建了一个导出的瞬时速度预测器。我们将 DiffusionNFT 的目标函数应用于该预测器，使得奖励优化在均值流中得以明确定义。采样过程仍基于平均速度，保留了均值流的快速少步生成特性。我们进一步证明 MeanFlowNFT 继承了 DiffusionNFT 的严格策略改进保证。在图像和视频生成任务上的实验表明，MeanFlowNFT 能持续提升基线性能。此外，在多数评测指标上（SD3.5-M 的 $8$ 项指标中占 $6$ 项），它超越了先前的少步生成器强化学习调优方法，甚至能以极少采样步数超越多步强化学习调优的扩散模型。例如在 Wan 2.1 数据集上，$4$ 步 MeanFlowNFT 取得了 $84.33$ 的 VBench 分数，超越了 $50$ 步 LongCat-Video RL 的 $82.57$ 分。

2607.14660.title: VIABench: A Comprehensive Video Benchmark Collected from Blind Individuals for Visual Impairment Assistance
2607.14660.abstract: Visually impaired individuals (VIIs) encounter significant daily challenges due to limited access to visual information. Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved impressive results on general vision and language tasks, their practical utility in real-world blind assistance still remains largely underexplored. To fill this gap, we introduce VIABench, a comprehensive video benchmark specifically designed to evaluate MLLMs in Visually Impaired Assistance scenarios using first-person videos recorded or shared by VIIs themselves. VIABench defines three core tasks, each targeting a distinct requirement in visual assistance. Proactive Reminder: Assesses the model's ability to interpret ongoing video content while proactively anticipating and verbally describing upcoming navigation-critical events; Visual Question Answering (VQA): Evaluates the model's capacity to answer user-posed questions about the environment or objects within the video; Vision-Guided Interaction: Tests context-aware reasoning to accomplish intentional interactions between user and environment. To ensure a robust and fair evaluation, we propose a rigorous benchmarking pipeline that supports both online (real-time) and offline settings. Our experiments demonstrate that current MLLMs still struggle to deliver comprehensive support for VIIs, especially in the Proactive Reminder task, which demands accurate anticipation and real-time responsiveness. We hope VIABench will drive future research toward developing customized MLLMs for real-world assistance, ultimately improving navigation and interaction experiences for visually impaired individuals. Code and data will be released atthis https URL.
2607.14660.abstract_zh: 视障人士因视觉信息获取受限而在日常生活中面临重大挑战。尽管多模态大语言模型在通用视觉与语言任务上取得了令人瞩目的成果，但其在实际盲人辅助场景中的应用价值仍亟待探索。为填补这一空白，我们推出了VIABench——一个基于视障人士自主录制或分享的第一人称视频构建的综合性视频基准，专门用于评估多模态大语言模型在视障辅助场景中的表现。VIABench定义了三大核心任务，分别针对视觉辅助的不同需求：主动提醒评估模型在解析实时视频内容时，能否主动预判并口头描述即将发生的导航关键事件；视觉问答评估模型回答用户关于视频中环境或物体所提问题的能力；视觉引导交互测试模型在完成用户与环境间有意图交互时所需的上下文感知推理能力。为确保评估的严谨性与公平性，我们提出了一套支持在线（实时）与离线双模式运行的严格基准测试流程。实验表明，当前多模态大语言模型仍难以对视障人士提供全面支持，尤其在需要精准预判与实时响应能力的主动提醒任务中表现欠佳。我们希望VIABench能推动未来研究开发面向实际辅助场景的定制化多模态大语言模型，最终提升视障人士的导航与交互体验。代码与数据集将通过此链接发布。

2607.10463.title: GRASP: GRanularity-Aware Search Policy for Agentic RAG
2607.10463.abstract: Agentic retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) extends static RAG by allowing language models to iteratively reason, generate search queries, retrieve evidence, and predict answers. However, it remains challenging for models to decide when to retrieve, whether to use lexical matching or semantic similarity, and how to control context granularity to prevent irrelevant tokens from interfering with agent reasoning. In this paper, we introduce GRASP, a reinforcement learning (RL) framework for training agents to adaptively coordinate complementary retrieval tools during multi-step reasoning. GRASP provides the agent with semantic search, keyword search, and paragraph-reading actions, enabling it to retrieve sentence-level evidence and expand further context only when needed. We train the policy with a reward that jointly accounts for answer accuracy, grounded reading, complementary search, and turn efficiency. Experiments on multi-hop reasoning benchmarks show that GRASP improves both retrieval recall and downstream question answering performance compared with single-step retrieval, prompting-based agentic RAG, and RL-based retrieval baselines. Qualitative and ablation analyses show that the learned policy develops interpretable skimming and scanning behavior: it uses semantic search for broad exploration, paragraph reading for local verification, and keyword search for entity-specific evidence. These results suggest that learning to coordinate retrieval signals and context granularity is critical for agent's correct reasoning.
2607.10463.abstract_zh: 代理式检索增强生成（Agentic retrieval-augmented generation, RAG）通过允许语言模型迭代地进行推理、生成搜索查询、检索证据并预测答案，扩展了静态RAG的功能。然而，模型在决定何时进行检索、使用词法匹配还是语义相似性搜索，以及如何控制上下文粒度以避免无关信息干扰代理推理方面仍面临挑战。本文提出GRASP，一种强化学习（reinforcement learning, RL）框架，用于训练代理在多步推理过程中自适应地协调互补的检索工具。GRASP为代理提供了语义搜索、关键词搜索和段落阅读三种操作，使其能够检索句子级证据，并仅在需要时进一步扩展上下文。我们通过综合考虑答案准确性、基础阅读质量、互补搜索效果及回合效率的奖励机制来训练策略。在多跳推理基准测试上的实验表明，与单步检索、基于提示的代理式RAG以及基于强化学习的检索基线相比，GRASP同时提升了检索召回率和下游问答性能。定性与消融分析显示，学习到的策略形成了可解释的略读与精读行为：代理使用语义搜索进行广泛探索，通过段落阅读进行局部验证，并利用关键词搜索获取实体特异性证据。这些结果表明，学习协调检索信号与上下文粒度对于代理的正确推理至关重要。

2607.15277.title: Partition, Prompt, Aggregate: Statistical Self-Consistency in Language Models
2607.15277.abstract: In-context learning is commonly interpreted as a form of conditional inference, in which the prompt specifies a context and the model's output is treated as an estimate of the corresponding conditional distribution. If this interpretation holds, then LLM estimates should satisfy basic probabilistic identities. In particular, the law of total probability asserts that prior-weighted conditional distributions aggregate into population-level marginals over any valid partition of the population. In this work, we investigate to what extent LLM estimates adhere to this self-consistency principle. We use binary trees as an evaluation scaffold to recursively partition a population into increasingly fine-grained subpopulations. We then prompt LLMs with verbalized subpopulation descriptions in context, aggregate the resulting estimates back into population-level estimates, and compare them across partitions of varying granularity. Applying this protocol across problem domains and state-of-the-art frontier models, we show widespread violations of basic consistency properties. An in-depth study of persona prompting reveals a pattern we call the macro fallacy: estimates reconstructed from more fine-grained subpopulation responses are often better aligned with human reference data than direct population-level estimates. This effect persists across variations in tree structure and estimation task, and can be partially recovered through implicit prompting. Together, these findings suggest that models possess relevant subpopulation knowledge but do not reliably propagate it into aggregate estimates. This gap establishes statistical self-consistency as an unsaturated, reference-free criterion for evaluating LLMs.
2607.15277.abstract_zh: 上下文学习通常被解释为一种条件推断形式，其中提示（prompt）指定了上下文，而模型的输出被视为相应条件分布的估计。如果这一解释成立，那么大型语言模型（LLM）的估计应满足基本的概率恒等式。具体而言，全概率定律（law of total probability）指出，对总体进行任何有效划分后，先验加权的条件分布应聚合为总体层面的边际分布。本研究旨在探究大型语言模型的估计在多大程度上遵循这一自洽性原则。我们采用二叉树（binary trees）作为评估框架，递归地将总体划分为逐步细化的子总体。随后，我们在上下文中向大型语言模型提供文字化的子总体描述提示，将得到的估计结果重新聚合为总体层面的估计，并比较不同粒度划分下的估计一致性。通过在多个问题领域和前沿模型上应用该实验方案，我们发现模型普遍违反了基本的自洽性属性。对角色提示（persona prompting）的深入研究揭示了一种我们称之为宏观谬误（macro fallacy）的现象：与直接进行总体层面估计相比，从更细粒度子总体响应中重建的估计往往更符合人类参考数据。这一效应在不同树状结构、估计任务中持续存在，并可通过隐式提示（implicit prompting）部分恢复。综合来看，这些发现表明模型具备相关的子总体知识，但未能可靠地将其传播至聚合估计中。这一差距确立了统计自洽性作为评估大型语言模型的未饱和、无参考基准的评判标准。

2607.13491.title: DeepLoop: Depth Scaling for Looped Transformers
2607.13491.abstract: Looped Transformers scale sequential computation by applying a compact stack of physical blocks for multiple rounds, increasing unrolled depth without increasing stored parameters. This reuse changes the residual-scaling problem: in an untied Transformer, each residual branch receives and applies its own parameter update, whereas in a looped Transformer one shared update aggregates gradients from repeated visits and is read back by those same visits in the next linearized forward pass. We formalize this tied-depth effect through a first-order perturbation bound controlled by a visit-alignment coefficient $\kappa_R$. The bound recovers the DeepNorm exponent when visits decorrelate, but in the conservative aligned regime it requires the exponent to increase from $1/4$ to $1/2$ as loop count grows at fixed physical depth. The resulting method, \textbf{DeepLoop}, keeps the Post-LN DeepNorm architecture and sets $\alpha=(2N)^{1/2}$ and $\beta=(8N)^{-1/2}$ for unrolled depth $N$. On GPT-style looped language models at GPT-2 small and GPT-2 medium scale, DeepLoop is neutral when no physical block is revisited and improves validation loss and downstream accuracy once recurrent depth is activated. These results show that stable recurrent depth requires residual scaling rules that account for parameter visits, not only nominal layer count.
2607.13491.abstract_zh: 循环Transformer（Looped Transformers）通过使用紧凑的物理块堆栈进行多轮计算来扩展序列处理能力，从而在无需增加存储参数的情况下提升展开深度。这种重用机制改变了残差缩放问题的性质：在非绑定的Transformer中，每个残差分支接收并应用其独立的参数更新；而在循环Transformer中，一个共享的更新会聚合来自重复访问的梯度，并在下一次线性化前向传播中被这些访问重新读取。我们通过受访问对齐系数 $\kappa_R$ 控制的一阶扰动界，形式化了这种深度绑定效应。该界在访问去相关时恢复DeepNorm指数，但在保守的对齐状态下，当物理深度固定而循环次数增加时，指数需要从 $1/4$ 增大至 $1/2$。由此产生的方法——\textbf{DeepLoop}——保持后层归一化（Post-LN）的DeepNorm架构，并为展开深度 $N$ 设置 $\alpha=(2N)^{1/2}$ 和 $\beta=(8N)^{-1/2}$。在GPT-2小规模和中规模GPT风格的循环语言模型上，当没有物理块被重复访问时，DeepLoop保持中性效果；而一旦启用循环深度，它能够改善验证损失和下游任务准确率。这些结果表明，稳定的循环深度需要残差缩放规则同时考虑参数访问次数，而不仅仅是名义上的层数。

2607.14431.title: Smarter and Cheaper at Once: Byte-Exact KV-Cache Grafting Turns a Frozen Small Model into a Verified-Knowledge Flywheel
2607.14431.abstract: We report a way to make a frozen small language model both more capable and dramatically cheaper at once, without changing any weights. Verified knowledge is deposited once as a byte-exact key-value (KV) state artifact and later restored, by graft, into a fresh inference context. The restore is bit-exact: under a pinned deterministic configuration, the grafted logits are byte-for-byte identical to a fresh computation (SHA-256 equality), with zero KL divergence and 100% argmax agreement over fifty samples. We show that own-position graft is the unique numerically exact operating point on a model with floating-point rotary encoding, and we verify byte-exactness on two model scales (12B, 31B) and two GPU targets, one through a pre-registered replay. On AIME 2025, a frozen Gemma-4-12B moves from 80.0% to 93.3% once a verified solution library is grafted, above its own 77.5% and its 31B sibling's 89.2% published anchors. On the recurring case, eight problems the base model never solves within a 401,026-token budget are answered from cached verified solutions in 61 total decode tokens, a factor of 6,574 fewer tokens and about 8,700x less energy; the capability claim proper rests on held-out transfer (7 of 7 at 31B). The same byte-exact store widens usable context from 32,768 to 2,854,766 tokens at zero extra accelerator memory, and moves byte-identical between machines of the same architecture. We describe the system at the behavior level; the engine is proprietary, and every reported number is backed by committed input and output hashes so the scoring can be re-checked without it.
2607.14431.abstract_zh: 本文报告了一种无需改变任何权重、即可同时提升小型冻结语言模型的性能并显著降低其计算成本的方法。经验证的知识以字节精确的键值（KV，key-value）状态工件形式被一次性存储，随后通过嫁接技术恢复至全新的推理上下文中。这种恢复是比特级精确的：在固定的确定性配置下，嫁接产生的逻辑输出与全新计算的结果实现字节级别的一致性（SHA-256 相等），在五十个样本中 KL 散度为零且 argmax 一致率达到 100%。我们证明，在采用浮点旋转编码的模型上，自身位置嫁接是实现数值精确的唯一操作点，并在两种模型规模（12B、31B）和两种 GPU 目标上验证了字节精确性，其中一种通过预注册回放实现。在 AIME 2025 测试中，冻结的 Gemma-4-12B 模型在嫁接经验证的解题库后，准确率从 80.0% 提升至 93.3%，超过了其自身原有的 77.5% 基准及其 31B 同源模型已公布的 89.2% 锚点成绩。在重复案例中，基础模型在 401,026 个令牌的预算内从未解决的八个问题，通过缓存的已验证解决方案仅用 61 个解码令牌即得到答案，令牌使用量减少 6,574 倍，能耗降低约 8,700 倍；性能提升的主张主要基于在未见过数据上的迁移效果（31B 模型上 7 个问题全部解决）。相同的字节精确存储库在无需额外加速器内存的情况下，将可用上下文长度从 32,768 令牌扩展至 2,854,766 令牌，并可在相同架构的机器间实现字节级一致的迁移。我们在行为层面描述了该系统；其引擎为专有技术，且所有报告数据均附有经提交的输入与输出哈希值，确保在无需引擎的情况下亦可重新验证评分结果。

2607.10995.short_zh: 高效三维高斯重建长序列场景
2607.10995.tags: 计算机图形学;三维重建;长序列新视角合成
2607.10995.body_summary:
现有通用三维高斯重建方法在长序列新视角合成中存在大量计算冗余
提出非对称架构分离几何与外观建模，减少冗余并提升效率

2607.14935.short_zh: 开源高效通用视频大模型
2607.14935.tags: 多模态学习;视频理解;视频大语言模型
2607.14935.body_summary:
当前开源视频理解模型存在泛化性差、计算成本高和开放不彻底的问题。
提出VideoChat3，通过高效时空建模和多样化数据合成，实现了广泛泛化与计算效率的平衡。

2607.14777.short_zh: 自进化策略蒸馏强化学习
2607.14777.tags: 强化学习;智能体决策;轨迹后见技能提取
2607.14777.body_summary:
大语言模型在长程交互任务中面临稀疏奖励的监督难题。
该框架将完成轨迹转化为后见技能并蒸馏为密集监督信号，与强化学习联合优化。

2607.15257.short_zh: 多智能体协作提升搜索鲁棒性
2607.15257.tags: 自然语言处理;信息检索;开放域信息搜索
2607.15257.body_summary:
当前工具增强大语言模型在开放域信息搜索任务中，随着交互历史增长，容易出现重复搜索循环，导致资源浪费和结果质量下降。
本文提出SearchOS框架，通过显式、持久、共享的状态管理，将搜索进程外部化，并设计并行调度机制和技能系统来提升协作效率与鲁棒性。

2607.15207.short_zh: 攻击世界动作模型的视觉对抗方法
2607.15207.tags: 机器人;具身智能;世界动作模型对抗攻击
2607.15207.body_summary:
世界动作模型（WAMs）通过学习将动作生成与未来世界预测耦合的表示，被视为实现具身控制的一种稳健且有前景的基础。
本文揭示了这种耦合的脆弱性，提出了BadWAM框架来实施并评估世界动作漂移攻击，这类攻击通过微小视觉扰动破坏模型想象与执行间的对齐，显著降低了任务成功率。

2607.14202.short_zh: 评估关键帧引导视频生成
2607.14202.tags: 计算机视觉;视频生成;关键帧条件视频生成评测
2607.14202.body_summary:
视频生成越来越多地依赖于基于关键帧的工作流，但现有方法是否能忠实遵循关键帧并保持视频质量尚不明确。
提出了首个关键帧条件视频生成评测基准KeyFrame-Compass及自动化评测框架，实验揭示了现有模型在忠实执行关键帧与视频自然度之间存在权衡等根本局限。

2607.14189.short_zh: 多参考音视频生成评测基准
2607.14189.tags: 计算机视觉;多模态生成;多参考音视频生成
2607.14189.body_summary:
多参考音视频生成任务需要模型根据多个参考和文本指令生成内容，但目前缺乏综合性评测基准。
提出了多参考音视频生成基准MultiRef-Compass，包含精心构建的数据集和包含四个维度的评测协议，对八个代表性系统进行了评测并指出了改进空间。

2607.14952.short_zh: 长上下文强化学习训练方法
2607.14952.tags: 强化学习;序列建模;长上下文优化
2607.14952.body_summary:
强化学习训练常受限于短上下文，而实际部署常需要处理超百万token的长序列。
提出了LongStraw系统，通过优化计算图与内存使用，在固定GPU预算下实现了对超200万token序列的强化学习训练。

2607.12800.short_zh: 统一学习视觉推理能力
2607.12800.tags: 视觉推理;从视觉数据学习;多任务视觉推理
2607.12800.body_summary:
学习从原始视觉数据中直接获取广泛的世界知识是智能体的基本能力。
我们提出了UniVR框架，首次探索同时从纯视觉演示中学习复杂推理、细粒度物理动力学和长期规划，其核心是VR-GRPO强化学习范式，并在构建的VR-X基准上取得了显著提升。

2607.14076.short_zh: 游戏引擎式交互世界建模
2607.14076.tags: 计算机图形学；游戏人工智能；交互世界生成模型
2607.14076.body_summary:
探讨如何构建能持续响应玩家操作的交互式游戏世界，并总结现有方法的优缺点。
提出了一个用于研究游戏世界建模的数据引擎，并基于四个维度对现有技术进行了系统性分析。

2607.13188.short_zh: 同时理解与生成图像的耦合自校正方法
2607.13188.tags: 计算机视觉；多模态生成；联合图像文本生成
2607.13188.body_summary:
人类认知中理解与生成是耦合的，现有扩散模型在联合生成图像和文本时存在跨模态矛盾且无法修正
提出自校正耦合马尔可夫跳跃过程框架及训练无关单步采样器，构建大规模数据集并实现跨模态纠错与性能提升

2607.03065.short_zh: 提取推理核心提升多领域性能
2607.03065.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型后训练;模型更新谱重定向
2607.03065.body_summary:
强化学习后训练对大规模语言模型造成推理性能抑制和多领域能力整合干扰。
提出谱子空间对齐重定向方法，提取并保留参数更新中的推理核心，以提升数学推理、代码能力并实现跨专家模型的无干扰融合。

2607.13399.short_zh: 解密策略蒸馏探索机制与调控
2607.13399.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型训练;策略蒸馏训练机制
2607.13399.body_summary:
策略蒸馏在大语言模型后训练中应用广泛但其训练机制尚不明确
研究发现策略蒸馏通过密集指导引导探索但易受信号质量影响导致路径偏差与长度利用问题提出轻量调控方法提升训练效果

2607.15038.tags: 计算机视觉；多模态交互；实时音视频交互
2607.15038.body_summary:
提出一个将视频视为“世界”与“事件流”的新框架，用于通用预训练。
开发了Wan-Streamer v0.3模型，实现了低延迟、全双工的实时音视频交互。

2607.15275.short_zh: 机器人长上下文策略训练新方法
2607.15275.tags: 机器人;机器人控制;机器人基础模型
2607.15275.body_summary:
现有机器人基础模型通常依赖单步或短时上下文，难以处理长序列任务。
提出RoboTTT，通过测试时训练扩展上下文至8K步，实现长时任务模仿、实时策略改进和更强鲁棒性。

2607.14749.tags: 音频生成；音乐生成；歌曲生成与分离
2607.14749.body_summary:
音乐生成基础模型面临长音频高效生成、高保真和控制性挑战。
提出WanSong，纯扩散模型直接生成5分钟双轨歌曲，支持快速推理和定制。

2607.15273.short_zh: 强化学习优化平均速度生成器
2607.15273.tags: 生成模型;概率生成模型;平均速度生成器
2607.15273.body_summary:
将面向瞬时速度的强化学习框架扩展到平均速度生成模型。
提出MeanFlowNFT方法，优化平均速度生成器的奖励性能。

2607.14660.short_zh: 评估模型辅助盲人视频能力
2607.14660.tags: 多模态大语言模型;视觉语言理解;盲人辅助任务基准
2607.14660.body_summary:
盲人日常面临视觉信息缺失挑战，需评估多模态大模型辅助能力。
构建首个盲人视角视频基准，测试提醒、问答与交互三项核心任务。

2607.10463.short_zh: 智能代理自调节检索策略
2607.10463.tags: 自然语言处理;检索增强生成;多步问答推理
2607.10463.body_summary:
现有智能检索增强生成方法难以动态决定检索时机、方式与粒度，影响推理准确性和效率。
提出GRASP强化学习框架，训练代理自适应协调多种检索工具与上下文粒度，提升多跳问答性能。

2607.15277.short_zh: 大模型统计自洽性检验
2607.15277.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型;上下文学习统计一致性
2607.15277.body_summary:
检验大语言模型语境学习是否符合概率论基本一致性原理。
通过树形分区聚合子群估计，发现模型存在宏观谬误且自洽性普遍不足。

2607.13491.tags: 自然语言处理;深度神经网络;Transformer模型稳定性
2607.13491.body_summary:
循环Transformer通过参数共享实现深度扩展，但其梯度共享机制改变了残差缩放的需求。
提出了一种新的残差缩放方法DeepLoop，通过调整缩放指数来稳定训练，并在实验中验证了其有效性。

2607.14431.short_zh: 冻结小模型高效复用知识
2607.14431.tags: 自然语言处理;大语言模型推理;KV缓存精确嫁接
2607.14431.body_summary:
提升冻结小型语言模型能力与效率的需求迫切。
嫁接已验证知识KV缓存，实现模型性能显著提升与能耗大幅降低。

deep_analysis.2607.10995:
(1) **这篇论文所在的任务是什么？**
*   **任务名称：** 长序列场景的新视角合成。
*   **任务输入：** 同一个场景下，从多个不同角度拍摄的、高分辨率（如960P）的图片序列（例如32张图）。
*   **任务输出：** 一个可以从任意新视角渲染出高质量、高分辨率图片的3D场景模型。
*   **任务功能：** 给定一个场景的少量照片，快速（无需长时间优化）重建出该场景的3D表示，并能生成该场景从未见过的角度的照片。

(2) **这篇论文想解决什么问题？**
以前的通用3D高斯模型在处理长序列、高分辨率的图片输入时，为了追求渲染质量，会把图片切得很碎，变成非常多的“小块”（Token）。然后，模型会用大量的计算资源（比如堆叠很多Transformer层）来同时处理这些小块，去计算它们的3D几何（深度）和外观（颜色）。论文认为，这种设计存在**计算冗余**：它没有区分“几何重建”和“外观生成”这两个任务的难度和精度要求，对所有小块都一视同仁地投入大量计算，导致模型又大又慢，参数效率不高。

(3) **这篇论文的贡献是什么？**
1.  **提出核心见解：** 指出高质量渲染不一定需要超高精度的3D几何，且一旦几何确定了，预测外观（颜色）相对更容易。
2.  **提出非对称架构：** 基于上述见解，设计了一个“非对称高斯溅射”模型。它将几何和外观建模**解耦**到两个分支，并根据任务特点进行差异化设计：
    *   **几何分支：** 用**大块**的图片特征，分配**大部分参数**进行复杂的跨视角匹配，专心重建3D几何。
    *   **外观分支：** 用**小块**的图片特征，分配**很少的参数**，专注于捕捉细节颜色。
    *   两个分支通过**双向连接**相互指导（几何给外观深度信息，外观给几何细节信息）。
3.  **提升效率与性能：** 这种设计大幅减少了计算冗余，提高了参数利用效率。使得一个更小、更快的模型，能够在长序列场景重建任务上，达到甚至超越之前更大、更复杂模型的性能。

(4) **论文的整体思路和模型结构**
*   **基模：** 基础思想建立在“3D高斯溅射”和“基于Transformer/Mamba的通用3D重建模型”之上。
*   **核心思路：** **“非对称设计，分而治之”**。不把所有图片小块混在一起用复杂模型处理，而是分开处理几何和外观任务。
*   **整体流程：**
    1.  **输入：** 多张（如32张）高分辨率场景图片。
    2.  **特征提取与分块：** 用一个共享的视觉编码器（如ViT）为每张图片提取特征。然后，将这些特征图按两种方式切割成“Token”：
        *   **粗粒度Token（给几何分支）：** 切得比较大，数量少。
        *   **细粒度Token（给外观分支）：** 切得比较小，数量多。
    3.  **非对称双分支处理：**
        *   **几何分支：** 接收所有图片的**粗粒度Token**。因为几何重建（计算深度）需要很强的跨视角信息交互能力，所以这个分支使用了**参数多、计算能力强**的模块（论文提到在节省的计算量基础上，增加了注意力层来增强上下文理解）。它的主要任务是预测每个3D高斯点的**位置、尺度和旋转**（几何属性）。
        *   **外观分支：** 接收所有图片的**细粒度Token**。因为外观（颜色）预测相对简单，这个分支使用**参数量少、结构轻量**的模块。它的主要任务是预测每个3D高斯点的**颜色和不透明度**（外观属性）。
    4.  **分支间交互：** 两个分支不是独立的。它们通过**双向连接**交换信息：
        *   **几何 → 外观：** 几何分支预测的深度/3D位置信息会指导外观分支，告诉它“这个颜色应该附着在哪个3D点上”。
        *   **外观 → 几何：** 外观分支提供的精细颜色/纹理细节信息会反馈给几何分支，帮助它更好地理解场景结构。
    5.  **输出与渲染：** 两个分支的输出（几何属性 + 外观属性）共同构成了一个完整的“3D高斯场景”。将这个场景送入标准的**3D高斯溅射渲染器**，就可以从任意新视角快速渲染出高质量的图片。

(5) **结果怎么样？**
论文的实验结果表明，AsySplat模型非常有效：
*   **质量高：** 在32视角、960P分辨率的长序列输入上，其渲染质量可以媲美需要针对每个场景长时间优化的传统方法。
*   **速度快：** 相比上述优化方法，实现了近**800倍的加速**。
*   **效率高：** 在“零样本”泛化能力（即直接处理新场景，无需微调）上，超越了当前最先进的通用3D高斯模型，同时使用的**参数量更少**，**训练和推理的开销也更低**。
*   **总结：** 达到了 **“用小模型，办大事”** 的效果，在性能、速度和模型大小之间取得了更好的平衡。

2607.10995.caption:
Figure 2:Framework overview of AsySplat.For Gaussian reconstruction from long-sequence inputs, AsySplat reallocates computation by decoupling the modeling of geometry and appearance into two branches, aligning each with its precision needs and learning difficulty.
The geometry branch processes coarse-grained tokens through three hierarchical stages with progressively increasing network capacity, leveraging bidirectional Mamba[69]and a sparse attention module (Fig.3) to model the completeinter-frametoken interactions. The appearance branch handles fine-grained tokens using lightweight MambaVision[22]with token interactions restricted tointra-frame.
A bilateral connection module enables cross-branch interaction, and the final outputs from both branches are merged for Gaussian prediction.
The asymmetry across branches is reflected in token granularities, computation, and parameter distribution.
2607.10995.caption_zh: 图 2：AsySplat 框架概览。针对长序列输入的高斯重建，AsySplat 通过将几何与外观建模解耦为两条分支并使其分别与精度需求和学习难度对齐，从而重新分配计算量。几何分支通过三个层次化阶段（网络容量逐渐增加）处理粗粒度令牌，利用双向 Mamba[69] 和稀疏注意力模块（图 3）对完整的帧间令牌交互进行建模。外观分支使用轻量级 MambaVision[22] 处理细粒度令牌，其令牌交互仅限于帧内。双边连接模块实现跨分支交互，两条分支的最终输出合并以进行高斯预测。分支间的不对称性体现在令牌粒度、计算量和参数分布上。

2607.10995.caption: Figure 1:Our AsySplat reduces computational redundancy in the long-sequence Gaussian reconstruction model, by decoupling it into asymmetric geometry and appearance branches. The asymmetry spans token granularity, computation allocation, and parameter distribution, which is motivated by two observations:(i)High-precision geometry is not a must for high-quality rendering.(ii)Once geometry is estimated, high-precision appearance attributes are easy to model by assigning pixel-aligned RGB evidence to Gaussians. This design enables a markedly smaller model to achieve strong performance with reduced training and inference overhead.
2607.10995.caption_zh: 图1：我们的AsySplat方法通过将长序列高斯重建模型解耦为不对称的几何分支与外观分支，减少了计算冗余。这种不对称性体现在token粒度、计算分配和参数分布上，其设计动机基于两点观察：(i)高质量渲染并不必需高精度几何；(ii)一旦几何被估计，通过为高斯分布分配像素对齐的RGB证据，高精度外观属性易于建模。该设计使得模型显著更小，同时以更低的训练和推理开销实现强劲性能。

2607.10995.caption: Figure 3:Illustration of the sparse attention module. The input token sequence is reshaped into 2D token maps, which are processed by two convolutional blocks to preserve contextual completeness. The refined token maps are partitioned with a uniform grid of sizepg×pgp_{g}\times p_{g}, which are rearranged into a sequence of reduced length for self-attention.pgp_{g}is set to 2 for clarity in this illustration.
2607.10995.caption_zh: Figure 3:Illustration of the sparse attention module. The input token sequence is reshaped into 2D token maps, which are processed by two convolutional blocks to preserve contextual completeness. The refined token maps are partitioned with a uniform grid of sizepg×pgp_{g}\times p_{g}, which are rearranged into a sequence of reduced length for self-attention.pgp_{g}is set to 2 for clarity in this illustration.
